'''Venzeiia 2 Prime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Venzeiia system/Legends|Venzeiia system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] that was subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==History==
At some point following the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] defeat at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] at the hands of the Empire, it was subjugated by Imperial forces for harboring a Rebel [[Spy/Legends|spy]] in a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 transport]].

In a training simulation for [[TIE pilot]]s working to fly the advanced [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]], they had to prevent a Rebel [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] escaping from a salvage using the [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
